calendar.matters:
Minor'S Comp
Off Calendar Apr-29-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Patty Lee Hubble.
Krsto Mijanovic, Esq., Special appearance with the Petitioner: Jessica Fontenot, present as Guardian at litem for: Shuri Kemoni Smith, a minor Claimant, was sworn and examined.
On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.
No fees or costs
A net balance of $4,000.00 to be deposited into a blocked account with Wells Fargo Bank, CA., no withdrawals shall be made without a written court order or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.
Counsel to prepare Orders.

April 29, 2005
Order Approving Compromise of Claim and Order to Deposit Money Into Blocked Account signed in open court.
